arts.ttl: Breaking: 'There are no secrets!': Rotherham boss addresses reported Portsmouth transfer interest in ex-Arsenal man
arts.sum: Rotherham boss Steve Evans has confirmed Pompey’s interest in Cohen Bramall.

arts.ttl: Sunderland and Portsmouth in final negotiations for loan deal – Player keen on Stadium of Light exit
arts.sum: Sunderland are set to sign youngster Adil Aouchiche on loan to Portsmouth until the end of the season. That’s according to Foot Mercato, who report that the 22-year-old midfielder is set to move to the Championship strugglers in search of regular playing time. arts.ttl: Aouchiche, Towler, Bramall, Moxon, Stevenson: Portsmouth transfer window state of play as business ramps up
arts.sum: Time is ticking, the transfer window shuts at 11pm on Monday - and here is the current state of play with Pompey’s remaining business...
